        internal static global::ExpressiveSharp.IRewritableQueryable<TResult> __Polyfill_Select_0<TElem, TResult>(

            global::System.Func<TElem, TResult> _)
        {

            var p_o = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Parameter(typeof(global::TestNs.Order), "o");
            /* Unsupported IOperation: AnonymousObjectCreation */ // new { o.Id, o.Name }
            var expr_0 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Default(typeof(global::<anonymous type: int Id, string Name>));
            var __lambda = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Lambda<global::System.Func<global::TestNs.Order, global::<anonymous type: int Id, string Name>>>(expr_0, p_o);
            return (global::ExpressiveSharp.IRewritableQueryable<TResult>)(object)
                global::ExpressiveSharp.Extensions.ExpressionRewriteExtensions.WithExpressionRewrite(
                    global::System.Linq.Queryable.Select(

        }
